title: FormatTemporalPlainDateTime<{min,max}>
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatTemporalPlainDateTime<{min,max}> (a Temporal.PlainDateTime branded with a date-time range); the bounds constrain validation only, so the PlainDateTime serializes exactly like an unbranded one — toJSON() "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss" string in JSON, restored via Temporal.PlainDateTime.from().
notes: Branded Temporal.PlainDateTime: serialization uses the base Temporal kind (brand is validation-only); JSON carries the plain-date-time string and restores via .from().
